query:
SELECT l.id, u.name, l.status, l.itemCount, l.error, l.sentAt
FROM userEmailSendLog l
JOIN users u ON u.id = l.userId
WHERE l.digestType = 'thursday'
  AND l.sentDate = '2026-05-14'
ORDER BY l.sentAt ASC;
command:
